name: Prem AI
description: Sovereign AI platform for fine-tuning, deploying and running small language models and enterprise LLM agents on private infrastructure.

seo.title: Prem AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Prem AI: Sovereign AI platform for fine-tuning, deploying and running small language models and enterprise LLM agents on private infrastructure.

when_to_use: Deploying LLMs on private infrastructure with full data control
Running open-source models with a managed API layer on-premise
Building GDPR-compliant AI apps without sending data to external APIs
Self-hosting a ChatGPT-like interface over private documents

pros: Sovereign deployment of small language models
Agent tooling included on the platform
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Together or Anyscale
Requires commitment to smaller open models
review.verdict: A credible pick if data sovereignty trumps frontier-model quality; less compelling for pure performance chasers.
review.best_for: Regulated industries needing on-prem or private-cloud LLMs
review.not_for: Teams where frontier-model quality outweighs sovereignty

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
